name: yalla-video
description: Yalla London branded video system — Remotion compositions + CLI

scripts.render:intro: npx remotion render src/index.ts BrandIntro out/brand-intro.mp4
scripts.render:outro: npx remotion render src/index.ts BrandOutro out/brand-outro.mp4
scripts.render:overlay: npx remotion render src/index.ts StoryOverlay out/overlay.mov --codec=prores --prores-profile=4444

author: Zenitha.Luxury LLC
